prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科/物理类最低位次依次约29385→30812→28708→27973→31392名，近5年波动较大，2025年基准约31392名，较2024年后移约3419名，显示当年报考热度有所回落；该校在广西理科/物理类招生计划：2021年20人、2022年28人、2023年28人、2024年42人、2025年50人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026年计划50人，与2025年持平，扩招势头暂停，竞争压力未因计划增加而缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，隶属中国石油大学（北京）体系；软科中国大学排名中校本部约第62名，近年排名稳定，学校层次定位清晰；该校在声誉舆情、抖音热度及投档线异常文件中均无显著记录，社会关注度一般，未出现明显正面或负面舆情冲击报考心理；该校以石油石化特色为主，第五轮学科评估中校本部相关学科（如化学工程与技术、地质资源与地质工程等）实力较强，但克拉玛依校区作为分校区未单独收录评估数据，优势学科信号不突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业涵盖计算机类、自动化、电气类等热门方向，但主体仍为石油化工类（属传统工科）；2026年广西物理类考生估算约26.9万人，较2025年增加约3.3%，整体竞争加剧；学校位于新疆克拉玛依市，距广西较远，地域偏好可能使部分考生犹豫，对位次有一定后移压力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次31392名、2026年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生增加约3.3%导致竞争加剧、以及学校地处偏远的地域因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约31592名，区间31092-32092名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 29385 → 30812 → 28708 → 27973 → 31392, with significant fluctuations in the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is about 31392, shifting back by about 3419 positions compared to 2024, indicating a decline in application popularity that year. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Guangxi: 20 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 42 in 2024, 50 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 50, unchanged from 2025, pausing the expansion momentum, and competitive pressure has not eased due to the increase in plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, affiliated with the China University of Petroleum (Beijing) system. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, the main campus ranks about 62nd, with stable rankings in recent years, providing a clear positioning of the university's level. There are no significant records in reputation public opinion, Douyin popularity, or abnormal admission score files, indicating average social attention and no obvious positive or negative public opinion impacting application psychology. The university is primarily characterized by petroleum and petrochemical specialties. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the main campus's related disciplines (such as Chemical Engineering and Technology, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering) are strong, but the Karamay campus, as a branch, has not been separately included in evaluation data, so the signal of advantageous disciplines is not prominent.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors include popular directions such as Computer Science, Automation, and Electrical Engineering, but the main body remains petrochemical majors (traditional engineering). In 2026, the estimated number of physics category candidates in Guangxi is about 269,000, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025, intensifying overall competition. The university is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, far from Guangxi, and regional preferences may cause some candidates to hesitate, exerting some downward pressure on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 31392, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the increase of about 3.3% in local physics category candidates leading to intensified competition, and the remote location of the university, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift back compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 31592, with a range of 31092-32092.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is in the range of 31092-32092. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Chemical Engineering and Technology, New Energy Science and Engineering, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Automation, Petroleum Engineering, etc.) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Environmental Engineering, Energy Chemical Engineering, etc.) as a safety net. When the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range, you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
